title: GenLayer Hackathon — Bradbury Builders
description:
A 2-week, fully online hackathon with 6 AI-native tracks, $5K+ in prizes, and onchain fee-sharing mechanics.
Submissions close April 3rd.

title: PL Genesis Hackathon: Frontiers of Collaboration
description:
A global builder competition with over $150,000 in rewards and two tracks: Fresh Code and Existing Code.
Submissions close March 31, 2026.

title: Open Agents
description:
> dates: April 24–May 6
> prizes: $50,000+ USD 💸
> think: autonomous agents, agentic finance, onchain infra

title: Zero to Agent: Lima - UNI
description: ​Zero to Agent es una semana de construcción global donde pasamos de una idea a un agente de IA real, desplegado y funcional usando v0 + Vercel. Pero tú y yo nos reuniremos el sábado 25 de abril en la Universidad Nacional de Ingeniería (UNI), en un solo espacio para crear, colaborar y, sobre todo, entregar.

title: Dev3pack Global Hackathon
description: The largest Web3 & AI student hackathon

title: Founder School
description: A 10-week, cohort-based, virtual, and equity-free program designed to help you go from zero to one.
